name: Profile_R5_InventoryItem_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.InventoryItem resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 InventoryItem resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.InventoryItem resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 InventoryItem resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.comment:
Element `InventoryItem.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `InventoryItem` is not mapped.
Element `InventoryItem.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
